Rule.name: Toolkit-WeightedMultiAttributeCorrelation
Rule.Description:
Correlates accounts to identities using weighted multi-attribute scoring. Compares account attributes against all identities, scoring each match by configurable weights. The highest-scoring identity above the threshold wins.
Trigger: Fires during aggregation when correlating an account to an identity. Variables in scope: context (SailPointContext), account (ResourceObject), application (Application), link (Link).
